headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Avery Dennison, Lowers Price Target to $190
summary: Citigroup  analyst Anthony Pettinari   maintains Avery Dennison (NYSE:AVY) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $201 to $190.
